title: Approval Readiness State Reconciliation
objective: Reconcile the Project Miner PM intake workbench and focused smoke expectations with the post-PM Lane 138 hosted truth: hosted schema, approval status readback, approval POST route registration, and bounded MCP read proof are green, while browser approval submission, first approval-row creation, project import, and field execution writes remain blocked.
active_role: Technical Repo Authority / PM Lane Coordinator / Workbench Reconciliation Executor

source_floor.meaning: Current clean-main after PM Lane 138 hosted schema gate closeout and post-closeout control-plane pooler maintenance closure.

allowed_scope: Update /pm-review/import-intake browser-local copy, readiness gates, operating queue, PM snapshot, handoff guide, exported Markdown text, and current action wording to reflect hosted schema/readback readiness truthfully.
Update the focused PM intake Playwright smoke expectations so the no-write workbench proves 2 of 6 readiness gates are ready initially and 4 of 6 are ready after local review evidence.
Keep approval status readback and hosted route registration as context only, not browser approval authority.
Update PM lane operating docs, status, and packet/handoff evidence for the no-write reconciliation lane.
Use read-only sidecar scout output only as recommendation context.
not_allowed: No project, workpackage, task, apparatus, issue, assignment, schedule, status, durable field record, production tracking, workbook, or import rows.
No live Supabase SQL application or schema migration.
No Render, Vercel, Olares, or Supabase action.
No secret value access, print, rotation, or repo storage.
No workbook macro execution or workbook writeback.
No service creation, DNS/auth/ingress change, fixture replay into live data, work authorization, field release, live work order creation, or autonomous AI business-state mutation.
validation_steps: PowerShell ConvertFrom-Json parse for this packet
validation_result: PASS: operations-web typecheck passed; operations-web production build passed; focused PM import-intake Playwright smoke passed with 1 passed; packet JSON parsed with ConvertFrom-Json; git diff --check passed; git diff --cached --check passed after scoped staging.
sidecar_result: Read-only sidecar recommended PM Lane 140 - Approval Readiness State Reconciliation. It identified the safe no-write scope: hosted schema gate green, approval status readback green, approval POST route registered, approval table still at zero rows, browser POST blocked, and project import blocked.
next_recommended_lane: PM Lane 141 - Browser Approval Submission Packet Design, still no live POST until explicitly admitted
